zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger FitzPicot de Saye於大約1085年出生在英國坎布利其爾可頓哈姆時，他的父親Robert FitzPicot II35歲，母親Adelaide de Beaumont37歲。他和Ethel de Bretagne至少有2個兒子。他去世於1160年在英國英格蘭肯特米爾頓享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger FitzPicot de Saye于大约1085年出生在英国坎布利其爾可頓哈姆时，他的父亲Robert FitzPicot II35岁，母亲Adelaide de Beaumont37岁。他和Ethel de Bretagne至少有2个儿子。他去世于1160年在英国英格兰肯特米爾頓享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger FitzPicot de Saye was born about 1085, in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Robert FitzPicot II, was 35 and his mother, Adelaide de Beaumont, was 37. He had at least 2 sons with Ethel de Bretagne. He died in 1160, in Milton, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger FitzPicot de Saye est né environ 1085, à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert FitzPicot II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Beaumont, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Ethel de Bretagne. Il est décédé en 1160, à Milton, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger FitzPicot de Saye um 1085 in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzPicot II 35 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Beaumont 37. Er hatte mit Ethel de Bretagne mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1160 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Milton, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger FitzPicot de Saye è nato il circa 1085 nel Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Robert FitzPicot II, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Beaumont, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Ethel de Bretagne. Morì nel 1160, nel Milton, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger FitzPicot de Sayeが約1085年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムで生まれた時，父Robert FitzPicot IIは35歳，母Adelaide de Beaumontは37歳であった。彼はEthel de Bretagneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1160年にイギリスイギリスケントミルトンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger FitzPicot de Saye(이)가 대략 1085년 영국 캄브리지실르 컷함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzPicot II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Beaumont(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Ethel de Bretagne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 미턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger FitzPicot de Saye nasceu aproximadamente 1085, em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert FitzPicot II, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Beaumont, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Ethel de Bretagne. Ele faleceu em 1160, em Milton, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger FitzPicot de Saye родился около 1085 г. в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert FitzPicot II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Beaumont, 37. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Ethel de Bretagne. Он умер в 1160 г. в местности милтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger FitzPicot de Saye nació aproximadamente 1085, en Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert FitzPicot II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Beaumont, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Ethel de Bretagne. Murió en 1160, en Milton, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
